title: 日本ダービーの後に・悔

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(If only I'd moved faster and with more agility on
the straight...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (Maybe I'd be standing in the winner's circle.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(I can still picture those final moments, competing
for the finish.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(It's like I'm stuck inside the race. If only I
could've done it differently...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Is this what they call regret?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. I gave it all I had, but I still lost.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I heard the last race of the Classic Triple Crown,
the Kikuka Sho, goes to the strongest runner.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I need to get stronger too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the concert, I take Narita Brian back to the
academy, where...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: There you are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Amazon?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I won the Japanese Oaks. That's two crowns in the
bag.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take the rest of the Tiara tour as well.
After that, I'm comin' for you at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You'd best be ready.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So Amazon thinks she can take the three tiaras
and the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
As if I'm going to just sit back and let that
happen.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
My goal for the rest of the year is to win both the
Kikuka Sho and the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've just been sharpening my fangs up until now.
Now they're strong enough to take the prey I
have ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this newfound motivation, she sets her sights
on the Kikuka Sho.
